/CAL:STATUS RE ESS/OR/MTR-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:02-23-18/REINORIG TC/PROB MOD/CTW:196/PJ:196 DAYS/CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST COMPLETE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM AT ST,  ANTHONY'S/X:DEFENDANT IS SENTENCED TO 1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL BUT THE SENTENCE IS STAYED PENDING COMPLETION OF TREATMENT PROGRAM AT ST, ANTHONY'S,/X:DEFENDANT MUST ADDITIONALLY HAVE GPS MONITORINGINSTALLED,/X:RESTITUTION FROM 17012220 TI VE /PROB EXT:06-27-22/4019HALF//CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT ON 03-12-18 IN DEPT 10/DOPU:IN PROGRAM/

/CAL SENTENCING/AJW/DNACOMP/X THE COURT INDICATES SENTENCE ON COUNT 1 IS3 YEARS STATE PRISON UPPER TERM,  ON COUNTS 4, 5, 8 AND 9 THE SENTENCE ISMONTHS EACH, ONE THIRD OF THE MID TERM, TO BE SERVED CONSECUTIVELY,/CH1P 3 Y U ESS PROB 5 Y PJ 25D/CTS 25/CTWP 195/IND/X THE DEFENDANT MUST SUCCSSFULLY COMPLETE A 12 TO 18 MONTH RESET PROGRAM,/X  THE DEFENDANT SHALL EROLL IN GPS MONITORING THROUGH THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT FOR 1 YEAR,/WS/X THE COURT INDICATES SEARCH CONDITION INCLUDES DEFENDANT'S ELECTRONIDEVICES, DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE PASSWORD(S) TO ELECTRONIC DEVICES UPON REEST BY A POLICE OFFICER,/X THE DEFENDANT SHALL NOT POSESS ANY BURGLARY TOS,/CTORD  BURGLARY TOOLS SEIZED IN THIS MATTER TO BE CONFISCATED AND DESTOYED/SA2 1000 VAN NESS AVENUE GARAGE, S,F,, CA (10 YARDS)/SA2 PARKING GARAGES LOCATED AT 123 O'FARRELL ST,, 444 STOCKTON ST,, 588 BRANNAN ST,, S,FCA (10 YARDS)/SA2 INTERSECTION OF GREEN ST, AND BATTERY ST,, S,F, CA (150YARDS)/SAORD/RESTV/X THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY VICTIM RESTITUTION TO CURTISLAYTON IN THE AMOUNT OF $572,29 AND RESTITUTION TO SILAS ALEXANDER IN THAMOUNT OF 527,06 TO PURSUANT TO ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION AND ABSTRACTF JUDGMENT FORMS FILED AND SERVED IN COURT TODAY,  RESTITUTION TO SILAS AXANDER IS JOINT AND SEVERAL WITH CO-DEFENDANT HAKIM N, TOOKES,  RESTITUTITO CURTIS LAYTON ISJOINT AND SEVERAL WITH CO-DEFENDANTS ANTWAN THOMAS ANHAKIM N, TOOKES,/  /VF4 300/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBREVFN/COA 40/ICNA/ /COLLECT/EY/ACCEP/
